articles.author: Stephen Clark
articles.title: Once again, ULA can’t deliver when the US military needs a satellite in orbit - Ars Technica
articles.description: ULA's Vulcan launch vehicle is grounded after a solid rocket booster anomaly last month.

articles.author: Sarah Perez
articles.title: Microsoft rolls back some of its Copilot AI bloat on Windows - TechCrunch
articles.description: The company is reducing Copilot entry points on Windows, starting with Photos, Widgets, Notepad, and other apps.
articles.content: Microsoft announced on Friday a series of changes focused on improving the quality of its Windows 11 operating system, which notably includes dialing back the number of entry points to its AI assista… [+2156 chars]
